title: application/jmap-chat-rich maps to BodyType::Unknown — silent mismatch for rich body dispatch
description: The rich body MIME type 'application/jmap-chat-rich' deserializes to BodyType::Unknown(String) with no dedicated variant. Callers writing match arms on BodyType will match Plain and Markdown explicitly and put rich bodies in the Unknown catch-all, silently dropping content. No doc warning on Message.body_type or BodyType calls this out. Every new contributor who adds body-type dispatch will hit this.
